kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: Matilda, Bridgegate, and Southgate go with 6 coins, 7 coins, and 12 coins, in some order.
The artisan in Riverside's levy is lower than both Aldric and Edmund.
12 coins goes with exactly one of Beatrix, Matilda, or Wulfric.
Either Oldwall goes with Rowan or someone in the River Ward goes with Rowan.
Beatrix's levy is exactly 2 coins more than the artisan in Eastcheap.
6 coins, 8 coins, and 10 coins go with Aldric, Beatrix, and Bridgegate, in some order.
The artisan in Kingsford's levy is immediately below Rowan.

fishing.name: The Fishing Derby
fishing.description: Anglers at the lake-country derby each landed a different fish from a different pond on a different lure. Work out who caught what, and where.

The angler at Stillwater's weight is lower than both Boone and Esther.
20 lb goes with exactly one of Cody, Mabel, or Wade.

Cody's weight is exactly 4 lb more than the angler at Cedarmere.
8 lb, 12 lb, and 16 lb go with Boone, Cody, and Birchpool, in some order.
The angler at Grayreach's weight is immediately below Royce.
